summary: Comprehensive testing of Knowledge Memory MVP - Auth, Study Packs, Concepts, Sessions, Dashboard, and all frontend pages. 15/17 backend tests passed. All UI pages and flows verified working.

critical.issue: Gateway 502 timeout when processing AI calls. The upload endpoint makes 3+ sequential Claude API calls per concept (extract_concepts → generate_checks → quality_filter) which takes >60 seconds total, exceeding the Kubernetes gateway timeout. Backend itself processes successfully but client receives 502. This means upload works but the UI shows an error to users.

integration_issues.issue: User sees gateway 502 error on upload even though backend processes correctly. Frontend shows error toast but concepts ARE created. User has no feedback that upload succeeded.

issues: Progress counter shows '1/1' instead of '1/3' after answering first question in a 3-item session - possible display bug in position tracking

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix upload endpoint 502 gateway timeout - implement background task processing (FastAPI BackgroundTasks) or async queue for AI pipeline. The upload endpoint takes 60-120s due to sequential Claude calls but gateway has ~60s timeout.
Consider adding polling mechanism: upload returns job_id immediately, client polls for completion status
MINOR: Verify session progress counter display (shows '1/1' after first answer in 3-item session)
critical_code_review_comments: Upload endpoint /api/packs/{id}/upload makes sequential AI calls (extract_concepts + generate_checks per concept + quality_filter) - this is O(n*3) Claude calls synchronously within a single HTTP request. With 3 concepts = 9+ Claude calls. Should use background tasks.
No test on upload shows the chunks filter (chunk_text returns empty for text <30 words) - test text needs to be long enough
server.py is 970 lines - consider splitting into router modules for maintainability

success_rate.backend: 88% (15/17 passed, 1 gateway timeout on upload, 1 skipped due to dependency on upload)
success_rate.frontend: 95% - all pages load and core flows work; upload shows error to user due to backend gateway timeout

seed_data_creation: Created test user: test_km_tester@example.com / password123. Created study pack 'TEST_Cyber Security Pack' with 3 firewall concepts extracted via AI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user: test_km_tester@example.com / password123. Pack ID: 69a0c27812e8a54c83092edb with 3 firewall concepts. The upload endpoint has a gateway timeout issue (CRITICAL). Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_knowledge_memory.py. All other APIs are working: auth, packs CRUD, concepts CRUD, sessions start+answer, dashboard overview.
rca_of_issue: Upload endpoint gateway timeout (502): The upload endpoint calls Claude AI 3+ times per concept synchronously within a single HTTP handler. For even 1 concept from a short text: (1) extract_concepts_from_chunk - 10-20s, (2) generate_checks_for_concept - 10-20s, (3) quality_filter_checks - 10-20s = 30-60s minimum. The Kubernetes ingress/gateway has a default timeout of ~60s. Fix: use FastAPI BackgroundTasks to process AI pipeline async and return job_id immediately, then poll for status.
